prior_batch_rationale: 3-way divergence: instruction (Turn 1 plan saying DON'T touch DimensionAnalysisChart.tsx), commit_message ('stable chart colors'), patch (DOES modify DimensionAnalysisChart.tsx)

verification.rationale_correction: Prior batch's framing is partially incorrect. (1) instruction.md is Turn 1 verbatim per the project design rule (CLAUDE.md: 'instruction.md = first user turn verbatim (no editing)'); the 'DON'T touch DimensionAnalysisChart' line is from the user's initial plan. (2) Turns 3 and 4 in user_simulation_prompt.md explicitly expand scope to DimensionAnalysisChart and add stable colors — so the patch modifying that file is the EXPECTED multi-turn outcome, not a divergence. (3) The canonical patch's commit_message field is literally '[reconstructed from session messages]' — there is no 'stable chart colors' commit message; that quote in the prior batch reasoning is fabricated.
real_drop_reasons: 3 reconstruction warnings: 'old text not found' for op[20] and op[23] in ModelTokensChart.tsx and op[59] in DimensionAnalysisChart.tsx — the reconstructed patch is incomplete/unreliable for those files
commit_message is a placeholder ('[reconstructed from session messages]'), so we cannot independently cross-check commit intent against the patch content

The patch (206 additions / 173 deletions across 8 files) is what the test gates were designed against, but with directional fidelity we cannot guarantee the patch faithfully reproduces the agent's final state — risk of test gates rewarding the wrong code shape

evidence.instruction_excerpt: Do NOT touch: - DimensionAnalysisChart.tsx — already uses a custom `content` component (different design)
reconstruction_warnings: op[20] edit: old text not found in apps/web/src/components/charts/ModelTokensChart.tsx
op[23] edit: old text not found in apps/web/src/components/charts/ModelTokensChart.tsx
op[59] edit: old text not found in apps/web/src/components/charts/DimensionAnalysisChart.tsx

drop_reason_summary: Patch reconstruction is directional-fidelity with 3 failed ops; commit_message is a placeholder. Prior batch's 'instruction vs patch' divergence framing was incorrect (it's expected multi-turn scope expansion), but the underlying patch-quality concern still justifies DROP.
